name: domain
description: Maintain UPPERCASE <NAME>.md (snapshot = final-goal milestone checkboxes) + sister <NAME>.log.md (append-only step log) at project root — auto-scaffolds both, defaults NAME to uppercase basename of git root. Subcommands: /domain set <NAME> (select the session's active domain — bare /domain <NAME> is a shortcut) · /domain goal <text> (add a final-goal milestone to the snapshot; /domain goal done <match> flips it to [x]) · /domain (show active domain + final-goal progress bar `▓▓▓░░ NN% · done/total` from the snapshot's checkboxes) · /domain done <match> (complete a snapshot goal, or if none flip a log task) · /domain todo <task> / <task> / new <header> (log). Progress is final-goal-based (snapshot completion), so it doesn't drift as the log grows.
